name: Plivo SMS
description: Plivo SMS channel for OpenClaw. Send and receive SMS through the Plivo Messages API with signed inbound webhooks.

authToken.description: Plivo Auth Token from https://cx.plivo.com. Signs and verifies inbound webhooks; keep it secret.

fromNumber.description: E.164 Plivo phone number or sender ID used for outbound SMS.

publicWebhookUrl.description: Public URL Plivo posts inbound messages to, for example https://agent.example.com/plivo-sms/webhook. Used to reconstruct the signed URL for signature verification.

webhookPath.description: Local webhook route registered in OpenClaw. Only change if you know what you are doing.

dmSecurity.description: Inbound and outbound DM security policy. allowlist restricts to allowFrom; open allows any phone number.

allowFrom.description: E.164 phone numbers allowed to message the bot when dmSecurity is allowlist.
